description: Unit test specifications for the Config class, testing configuration merging, type checking, and class properties.

classes.name: DummyConfigClass
classes.description: A subclass of Config used for testing, with a static NAME property.

methods.name: NAME
methods.description: Returns the string 'dummy', used as a plugin name identifier.

methods.name: _mergeConfigObj
methods.description: Merges configuration objects with data attributes from DOM elements, handling defaults and overrides.

methods.name: _typeCheckConfig
methods.description: Checks the types of configuration options against expected types, throws errors on mismatch.
